The '''Chorran shipjackers''' were a criminal band of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] thieves from the [[Chorra system/Legends|Chorra system]] that operated in [[Bamula sector/Legends|Bamula sector]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. They were routed on [[Donadus]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]].

{{Stub}}
